questions.title: Clinical Assessment - Pre-Eclampsia
questions.question_text: What assessment tools would you use for a patient with pre-eclampsia?
expected_points: Assess pre-eclampsia using appropriate assessment tools
Monitor vital signs and observations specific to pre-eclampsia
Implement evidence-based interventions for pre-eclampsia
Document findings and care provided
Escalate concerns appropriately in maternity setting
